channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wander Franco trial: Rays star faces sexual abuse, human trafficking charges in Dominican Republic
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco is scheduled to go to trial Thursday in the Dominican Republic in a sexual abuse case involving a 14-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: MARTÍN ADAMES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rolling the dice on his way to Las Vegas, Trae Young shows he's always a safe bet at MSG
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Trae Young was dribbling out the clock Wednesday night when he leaned down toward New York's center-court logo and pretended he was shooting dice. “We’re going to Vegas,” the Atlanta guard said, “so that’s what I had to.” When he's at Madison Square Garden, always bet on Young.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: North Carolina announces 5-year deal with Bill Belichick to take over as coach of the Tar Heels
item.description: Bill Belichick had seemingly been waiting for the right opportunity to return to an NFL sideline. Instead, the six-time Super Bowl-winning head coach is headed to the college ranks to take over at North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hawks rally for a 108-100 victory over the Knicks and a trip to the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: Trae Young had 22 points and 11 assists, De’Andre Hunter and Jalen Johnson outplayed the Knicks frontcourt and the Atlanta Hawks took their surprising NBA Cup run all the way to the semifinals in Las Vegas, beating New York 108-100 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WNBA and players' union meet to discuss new CBA
item.description: The WNBA and the league’s players union met in person to discuss a new collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Michigan football releases 2025 schedule: Wolverines have big time matchups next season
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines have released their schedule for the 2025 football season with a lot of enthusiasm.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Former NFL coach Bill Belichick has agreed become the Tar Heels’ next coach, AP source says
item.description: By ROB MAADDI and AARON BEARD Six-time Super Bowl champion Bill Belichick has agreed to become North Carolina’s next football coach, a person with knowledge of the decision said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Juan Soto gets free luxury suite and up to 4 premium tickets for home games in $765M Mets deal
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Juan Soto gets free use of a luxury suite and up to four premium tickets behind home plate for regular-season and postseason New York Mets home games as part of his record $765 million, 15-year contract that was finalized Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Do the Rangers even care? They don't look like they do
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Rangers stink. GM Chris Drury is in crisis mode. They have lost 8 of 10. Drury has sent a memo to the rest of the league saying the Blueshirts are open for business, but that had little impact.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Lake Placid working with Italian officials as a backup sliding site for 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Lake Placid would play host to bobsled, luge and skeleton events for the 2026 Olympics if a track currently being rebuilt in Italy isn't finished in time for the Milan-Cortina Games, officials said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patrick Mahomes bashes NFL for making Chiefs play on Christmas Day
item.description: Patrick Mahomes spoke out against the NFL's decision to schedule three games in 11 days for the Chiefs, including a Christmas Day contest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Green Bay Packers sign Michael Jordan to their practice squad — the offensive lineman
item.description: The Green Bay Packers have signed Michael Jordan to their practice squad. But before Chicago sports fans bemoan the most legendary athlete in city history going to the city's most hated rival, relax: It's not THAT Michael Jordan. For one, he didn't play football. For another, he's 61 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Kings make 22 three-pointers, blow out Jazz, 141-97
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - On Friday, the Utah Jazz put up 141 points in a blowout win over Portland. On Sunday, they were on the receiving end of a 141-point outburst. Kevin Huerter had 26 points, including six 3-pointers, and the Sacramento Kings beat the Utah Jazz 141-97 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4
